name: ai-context-os-monorepo
description: AI Context OS — research + CLI framework

scripts.test:release: npm run verify:release && npm run test:install-smoke
scripts.test:framework: npm run test:node-compat && npm run test:release && npm run test:cli && npm run test:scaffold && npm run test:reference && npm run test:doctor && npm run test:profiles && npm run test:score-architecture && npm run test:maturity && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:check && npm run test:check-gates && npm run test:route-budget && npm run test:routing-lint && npm run test:core-version && npm run test:contracts && npm run test:api-contract && npm run test:audit-report && npm run test:audit-history && npm run test:semantic-offline && npm run test:drift
scripts.test:cli: node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs init --name demo --profile minimal --target /tmp/context-os-demo-test --force && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs validate --root /tmp/context-os-demo-test --schema && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs route "deploy to production" --root /tmp/context-os-demo-test
scripts.test:scaffold: npm run context-os -- validate --root examples/scaffold-saas --schema && npm run context-os -- eval route --root examples/scaffold-saas && npm run context-os -- eval dry-run --root examples/scaffold-saas
scripts.test:reference: npm run context-os -- validate --root examples/reference-saas --schema && npm run context-os -- score --root examples/reference-saas --min 85 && npm run context-os -- eval route --root examples/reference-saas && npm run context-os -- eval dry-run --root examples/reference-saas && npm run context-os -- check --root examples/reference-saas --min-score 85 && npm run context-os -- maturity --root examples/reference-saas --min operational
scripts.test:maturity: npm run context-os -- maturity --root examples/scaffold-saas --min routable && npm run context-os -- maturity --root examples/scaffold-saas --json
scripts.test:adapters: rm -rf /tmp/context-os-adapters-test && mkdir -p /tmp/context-os-adapters-test && printf '# Existing instructions\n' > /tmp/context-os-adapters-test/AGENTS.md && npm run context-os -- adapters install agents claude copilot cursor --root /tmp/context-os-adapters-test && npm run context-os -- adapters install agents claude copilot cursor --root /tmp/context-os-adapters-test && grep -q '# Existing instructions' /tmp/context-os-adapters-test/AGENTS.md && test "$(grep -c 'context-os:start' /tmp/context-os-adapters-test/AGENTS.md)" = 1 && npm run context-os -- adapters status --root /tmp/context-os-adapters-test --json
scripts.test:route-budget: npm run context-os -- check --root examples/reference-saas --min-score 85 --max-route-tokens 600 && if npm run context-os -- check --root examples/reference-saas --min-score 85 --max-route-tokens 500; then exit 1; else echo 'route budget rejection ok'; fi
scripts.test:routing-lint: npm run context-os -- routing lint --root examples/reference-saas --strict && node packages/cli/test/routing-lint.mjs
scripts.test:contracts: node packages/cli/test/contracts.mjs && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs contracts verify --root examples/reference-saas --base HEAD && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs contracts verify --root examples/scaffold-saas --base HEAD
scripts.test:ci-init: rm -rf /tmp/context-os-ci-test && mkdir -p /tmp/context-os-ci-test && npm run context-os -- ci init --root /tmp/context-os-ci-test --min-score 80 && test -f /tmp/context-os-ci-test/.github/workflows/context-os.yml && grep -q "npx context-os check --min-score 80" /tmp/context-os-ci-test/.github/workflows/context-os.yml && grep -q "cores verify --base origin/main" /tmp/context-os-ci-test/.github/workflows/context-os.yml && grep -q "contracts verify --base origin/main" /tmp/context-os-ci-test/.github/workflows/context-os.yml
scripts.test:audit-init: rm -rf /tmp/context-os-audit-test && npm run context-os -- init --name auditdemo --profile minimal --target /tmp/context-os-audit-test --force && npm run context-os -- audit init --root /tmp/context-os-audit-test --auditor CI && test -f /tmp/context-os-audit-test/context-os/audit/project-map.md && test -f /tmp/context-os-audit-test/context-os/audit/cleanup.md && test -f /tmp/context-os-audit-test/context-os/audit/risks.md && grep -q "auditdemo" /tmp/context-os-audit-test/context-os/audit/project-map.md
scripts.test:audit-report: rm -rf /tmp/context-os-audit-report-test && cp -R examples/reference-saas /tmp/context-os-audit-report-test && npm run context-os -- audit report --root /tmp/context-os-audit-report-test --min-score 85 && test -f /tmp/context-os-audit-report-test/context-os/audit/report.md && test -f /tmp/context-os-audit-report-test/context-os/audit/report.json && grep -q 'Overall: \*\*PASS\*\*' /tmp/context-os-audit-report-test/context-os/audit/report.md && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs audit report --root examples/reference-saas --json > /tmp/context-os-audit-report.json && node -e "const r=require('/tmp/context-os-audit-report.json'); if(!r.ok || r.summary.maturity!=='operational') process.exit(1)"
scripts.test:audit-history: rm -rf /tmp/context-os-audit-history-test && cp -R examples/reference-saas /tmp/context-os-audit-history-test && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs audit record --root /tmp/context-os-audit-history-test --min-score 85 && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs audit record --root /tmp/context-os-audit-history-test --min-score 85 && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs audit history --root /tmp/context-os-audit-history-test --json > /tmp/context-os-audit-history.json && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs audit compare --root /tmp/context-os-audit-history-test --json > /tmp/context-os-audit-compare.json && node -e "const h=require('/tmp/context-os-audit-history.json'); const c=require('/tmp/context-os-audit-compare.json'); if(h.snapshots.length!==2 || !c.ok) process.exit(1)" && node packages/cli/test/audit-history.mjs
scripts.test:profile-agent-tool: npm run context-os -- init --name agentdemo --profile agent-tool --target /tmp/context-os-agent-tool-test --force && npm run context-os -- validate --root /tmp/context-os-agent-tool-test --schema && cp /tmp/context-os-agent-tool-test/context-os/eval/questions.stub.json /tmp/context-os-agent-tool-test/context-os/eval/questions.json && npm run context-os -- eval route --root /tmp/context-os-agent-tool-test
scripts.test:profile-oss-library: npm run context-os -- init --name libdemo --profile oss-library --target /tmp/context-os-oss-library-test --force && npm run context-os -- validate --root /tmp/context-os-oss-library-test --schema && cp /tmp/context-os-oss-library-test/context-os/eval/questions.stub.json /tmp/context-os-oss-library-test/context-os/eval/questions.json && npm run context-os -- eval route --root /tmp/context-os-oss-library-test
scripts.test:eval-dry-run: npm run context-os -- eval run --root examples/scaffold-saas --condition b --dry-run --aggregate
scripts.test:eval-aggregate: npm run context-os -- eval aggregate experiments/oiloop/runs/run-1781660908
scripts.test:graph-build: npm run context-os -- graph build --root examples/scaffold-saas && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('examples/scaffold-saas/context-os/graph/graph-index.json','utf8')); if(j.stats.nodes<5) throw new Error('too few nodes'); console.log('graph ok', j.stats);"
